HCMC Service-Level Post-Promo Comparison

In [ ]:
svc_pre = (
    hcmc_service_persistence[hcmc_service_persistence["period"] == "Pre-Promo"]
    .drop(columns="period")
    .rename(columns=lambda c: c if c == "service_type" else f"{c}_pre")
)

svc_promo = (
    hcmc_service_persistence[hcmc_service_persistence["period"] == "Promo"]
    .drop(columns="period")
    .rename(columns=lambda c: c if c == "service_type" else f"{c}_promo")
)

svc_post = (
    hcmc_service_persistence[hcmc_service_persistence["period"] == "Post-Promo"]
    .drop(columns="period")
    .rename(columns=lambda c: c if c == "service_type" else f"{c}_post")
)

hcmc_service_postcheck = svc_pre.merge(svc_promo, on="service_type").merge(svc_post, on="service_type")

for metric in [
    "avg_weekly_transactions",
    "avg_weekly_active_users",
    "avg_weekly_net_gmv",
    "avg_weekly_discount_rate",
    "avg_weekly_txns_per_user",
    "avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn",
    "avg_weekly_rainfall"
]:
    hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_post_vs_pre_abs"] = (
        hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_post"] - hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_pre"]
    )
    hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_post_vs_promo_abs"] = (
        hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_post"] - hcmc_service_postcheck[f"{metric}_promo"]
    )

display(hcmc_service_postcheck)
service_type avg_weekly_transactions_pre avg_weekly_active_users_pre avg_weekly_net_gmv_pre avg_weekly_discount_rate_pre avg_weekly_txns_per_user_pre avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn_pre avg_weekly_rainfall_pre avg_weekly_transactions_promo avg_weekly_active_users_promo avg_weekly_net_gmv_promo avg_weekly_discount_rate_promo avg_weekly_txns_per_user_promo avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn_promo avg_weekly_rainfall_promo avg_weekly_transactions_post avg_weekly_active_users_post avg_weekly_net_gmv_post avg_weekly_discount_rate_post avg_weekly_txns_per_user_post avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn_post avg_weekly_rainfall_post avg_weekly_transactions_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_transactions_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_active_users_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_active_users_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_net_gmv_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_net_gmv_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_discount_rate_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_discount_rate_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_txns_per_user_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_txns_per_user_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_net_gmv_per_txn_post_vs_promo_abs avg_weekly_rainfall_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_rainfall_post_vs_promo_abs

2 GrabFood 3,211.67 2,488.17 529,081.01 0.00 1.29 164.75 4.57 6,247.83 3,891.50 843,801.31 0.18 1.61 135.05 66.11 2,779.50 2,226.00 457,669.83 0.00 1.25 164.66 5.93 -432.17 -3,468.33 -262.17 -1,665.50 -71,411.18 -386,131.48 0.00 -0.18 -0.04 -0.36 -0.09 29.61 1.37 -60.17
 

HCMC Post-Promo Benchmark vs Control Cities

In [ ]:
control_post_compare = city_postcheck[[
    "city",
    "avg_weekly_net_gmv_post_vs_pre_abs",
    "avg_weekly_transactions_post_vs_pre_abs",
    "avg_weekly_active_users_post_vs_pre_abs",
    "avg_weekly_discount_rate_post_vs_pre_abs",
    "avg_weekly_rainfall_post_vs_pre_abs"
]].copy()

display(control_post_compare)
city avg_weekly_net_gmv_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_transactions_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_active_users_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_discount_rate_post_vs_pre_abs avg_weekly_rainfall_post_vs_pre_abs
0 Da Nang -1,338.89 -5.50 -1.17 0.00 -0.64
1 Hanoi 19,587.36 186.00 78.33 0.00 -0.83
2 Ho Chi Minh City -90,951.03 -755.33 -296.83 0.00 1.30
 

HCMC Total Net GMV: Pre vs Promo vs Post

In [ ]:
plot_df = city_persistence[city_persistence["city"] == "Ho Chi Minh City"].copy()

plt.figure(figsize=(8,4))
sns.barplot(data=plot_df, x="period", y="avg_weekly_net_gmv", order=["Pre-Promo", "Promo", "Post-Promo"])
plt.title("HCMC average weekly net GMV: Pre vs Promo vs Post")
plt.xlabel("")
plt.ylabel("Net GMV (k VND)")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
 

HCMC Net GMV by Service: Pre vs Promo vs Post

In [ ]:
plot_df = hcmc_service_persistence.copy()

g = sns.catplot(
    data=plot_df,
    kind="bar",
    x="period",
    y="avg_weekly_net_gmv",
    col="service_type",
    order=["Pre-Promo", "Promo", "Post-Promo"],
    height=4,
    aspect=1.0
)

g.set_titles("{col_name}")
g.set_axis_labels("", "Avg weekly net GMV (k VND)")
g.fig.suptitle("HCMC service-level persistence: Pre vs Promo vs Post", y=1.05)
plt.show()
 

Brief

 
| Table | Description |
|---|---|
| transactions | 182,000+ individual transactions across all cities and services |
| users | User profiles — city, payment preference, behavioural segment |
| weather_daily | Daily rainfall per city in mm |
| daily_gmv_summary | Pre-aggregated view for quick trend queries |
 

Data Dictionary

 

Tables

 

users

 
| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| user_id | INTEGER | Unique user identifier |
| city | TEXT | City of the user |
| payment_preference | TEXT | User's preferred payment method at registration |
| user_segment | TEXT | Behavioural segment assigned at registration |
| registration_date | TEXT | Date of account creation (ISO 8601) |
 
Distinct values

city: Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, Hanoi

payment_preference: Cash, ZaloPay, Card

user_segment: Voucher Hunter, Regular, Occasional, High Value
 

weather_daily

 
| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| date | TEXT | Date (ISO 8601) |
| city | TEXT | City name |
| rainfall_mm | REAL | Total rainfall in millimetres |
| rain_category | TEXT | Categorical classification of rainfall intensity |
 
Distinct values

rain_category: None, Light, Moderate, Heavy
 

transactions

 
| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| transaction_id | INTEGER | Unique transaction identifier |
| date | TEXT | Transaction date (ISO 8601) |
| week_number | INTEGER | Week number relative to dataset start (1–14) |
| period | TEXT | Named period the transaction falls within |
| city | TEXT | City where the transaction occurred |
| service_type | TEXT | Grab service used |
| user_id | INTEGER | Foreign key referencing users.user_id |
| payment_type | TEXT | Payment method used for this transaction |
| gross_gmv_k_vnd | REAL | Gross transaction value in VND thousands, before any discount |
| discount_k_vnd | REAL | Discount amount applied in VND thousands |
| net_gmv_k_vnd | REAL | Net transaction value in VND thousands, after discount |
| voucher_applied | INTEGER | 1 if a voucher was redeemed, 0 otherwise |
| rainfall_mm | REAL | Rainfall in millimetres on the transaction date and city |
 
Distinct values

period: Pre-Promo, Promo, Post-Promo

service_type: GrabBike, GrabCar, GrabFood

payment_type: Cash, ZaloPay, Card
 

View: daily_gmv_summary

 
| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| date | TEXT | Date (ISO 8601) |
| week_number | INTEGER | Week number (1–14) |
| period | TEXT | Named period |
| city | TEXT | City name |
| service_type | TEXT | Grab service |
| payment_type | TEXT | Payment method |
| net_gmv_k_vnd | REAL | Sum of net GMV in VND thousands |
| gross_gmv_k_vnd | REAL | Sum of gross GMV in VND thousands |
| total_discount_k_vnd | REAL | Sum of discounts in VND thousands |
| n_transactions | INTEGER | Count of transactions |
| n_voucher_redemptions | INTEGER | Count of transactions where a voucher was applied |
 

Notes

 
- All monetary values are in VND thousands. Divide by 1,000 to convert to millions.
- transactions.rainfall_mm is denormalised from weather_daily for convenience. Both columns contain the same values.
- week_number starts at 1 on 2024-01-01. Each increment represents 7 calendar days.
- The promo period covers weeks 7–12 (2024-02-12 to 2024-03-24).
Exported with runcell — convert notebooks to HTML or PDF anytime at runcell.dev.
